summary: First testing run of PUMP.OS Manufacturing ERP. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend fully functional with login, dashboard, navigation, and all key pages working correctly.

issues: Category column shows 'OTHER' for test items created via API (expected, as no category was passed in test payload - not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses Django ASGI and the backend .env has MONGO_URL/DB_NAME keys which are irrelevant for this Django+PostgreSQL app - no impact but could be cleaned up
Default credentials (admin/admin123) are visible on the login page UI which could be a security concern in production

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load, all modals open, all nav links work, all inventory tabs work

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_RM001, TEST_RM002 raw materials and TEST_PM001 product model via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows are working. App uses JWT auth with admin/admin123. Backend is Django+PostgreSQL (not MongoDB - the MONGO_URL in .env is a leftover). Test data: TEST_RM001, TEST_RM002, TEST_PM001 are in the DB. BOM, Purchase Entry, Production Orders, Reports pages load but were not deeply tested (no test data for those flows).
